name: memobox
description: Index-first task memory workflows for coding agents using the MemoBox CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Index-first task memory for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use MemoBox skills to recall project and global task memories, write task-completion Memory Mail, and curate local-first JSON memory stores through the existing memobox CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use MemoBox to recall relevant project memory.
Use MemoBox to remember this task outcome.
Use MemoBox to curate duplicate memories.
